channel.title: NYT > Technology
channel.description: Technology industry news, commentary, and analysis, with reporting on big tech, startups, and internet culture. The New York Times is a hub for conversation about news and ideas.

item.title: How A.I. Is Changing the Way Politicians Run for Office
item.description: A.I.-generated images are the public face of this election overhaul. Behind the scenes, campaigns are using the technology to analyze voter data, craft campaign materials and write custom messages.
item.dc:creator: Stuart A. Thompson

media:content.media:credit: Kriston Jae Bethel for The New York Times
media:content.media:description: Alex Bond speaks about his political views with canvassers from Ground Truth, a door-knocking program organized by Swing Left, a Democratic political group. Canvassers use an A.I.-powered app to record and analyze what voters say.
